steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: $16x = 30$. Subtracting 30 from 190 gives 160, not 30. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: $16x = 130$. $190 - 30 = 160 \neq 130$. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: $16x = 160$. Subtracting 30 from both sides of the original equation gives exactly $16x = 160$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
  • Choice D: $16x = 190$. That would mean 30 was never subtracted. Eliminated.
